protein_name: PP2A can modulate the activity of phosphorylase B kinase casein kinase 2, mitogen-stimulated S6 kinase, and MAP-2 kinase. Belongs to the PPP phosphatase family. PP-1 subfamily. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: mitotic cell cycle; negative regulation of canonical NF-kappaB signal transduction; negative regulation of gene expression; negative regulation of Ras protein signal transduction; negative regulation of tumor necrosis factor-mediated signaling pathway; protein dephosphorylation; regulation of microtubule polymerization; regulation of neurofibrillary tangle assembly; response to lead ion
